title: Scoregasm
notes: Don't enable gamepad in game when using the steam controller; bind kb/m instead.

title: Scoregasm
notes: Performance is great. Only issue encountered was with 360 controller, game defaults got one axis wrong on RS (can be configured) and movement in menus is a little bit sensitive, otherwise it's perfect.
Change xbox 360 gamepad in ingame settings “shooting axis: horiz. JOYU and vert. JOYV”; otherwise one shooting axis is bound to right trigger
